/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/podzbior.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/rowne.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/roznica.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/suma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/sym.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/wspolna.cpp.o -o main
